title: Legacy Surface Drift Follow-up
findings: 发现 2 个新 distinct legacy-surface drift：发布版 server README 漏列现行 MCP 工具，quarantined HTTP README 仍描述已过期的 Part 2/CI 布局；已排除 ISS-20260609-021/024、ISS-20260608-046/059/006 等同类已登记问题。
issues_found: [{"title":"Published server README omits the registered fab_archive_scan MCP tool","severity":"medium","description":"packages/server/README.md 的 ‘Tools exposed’ 列表只列 fab_plan_context、fab_get_knowledge_sections、fab_recall、fab_extract_knowledge、fab_review 五个工具，遗漏当前 server 实际注册并在根 README/runtime contracts/index tests 中声明的 fab_archive_scan。由于 packages/server/README.md 会随 @fenglimg/fabric-server 发布，直接消费 server 包的集成方会拿到不完整的 MCP tool surface。","location":"packages/server/README.md:5; packages/server/src/index.ts:221; docs/RUNTIME-CONTRACTS.md:47","fix_direction":"把 packages/server/README.md 的工具清单同步到当前 6-tool surface，补入 fab_archive_scan，并考虑用同一测试或生成源校验 README/package docs 与 packages/server/src/index.ts 注册表一致。","affected_components":["packages/server/README.md","@fenglimg/fabric-server published docs","MCP tool surface docs"],"tags":["legacy-surface-drift","published-docs","mcp-contract","tool-surface-drift"]},{"title":"Quarantined HTTP README still describes the pre-Part-2 layout and workspace skip model","severity":"low","description":"packages/server-http-experimental/README.md 仍说 HTTP server files are ‘planned Part 2’ and ‘still present in packages/server/src’, while the experimental package already contains src/http.ts, middleware/bearer-auth.ts and services/serve-lock.ts. The same README also says the dir is technically a workspace member skipped by no-op scripts, but the package tsconfig documents that it is excluded from pnpm-workspace and has a standalone typecheck path. Future web UI restoration or CI triage will follow stale package-layout instructions, distinct from the already registered removed-export import drift in ISS-20260609-021.","location":"packages/server-http-experimental/README.md:20; packages/server-http-experimental/README.md:43; packages/server-http-experimental/README.md:47; packages/server-http-experimental/tsconfig.json:2","fix_direction":"Refresh the quarantine README to current post-Part-2 state: list files now owned by packages/server-http-experimental, describe the standalone typecheck/explicit exclusion model, and update restoration steps to start from the package-local sources instead of pretending the HTTP implementation still lives in packages/server/src.","affected_components":["packages/server-http-experimental/README.md","packages/server-http-experimental/tsconfig.json","HTTP quarantine restoration docs"],"tags":["legacy-surface-drift","server-http-quarantine","docs-drift","ci-surface-drift"]}]
